brand.name: EDITH
brand.description: AI accountability coach for fitness. Unyielding, raw, strict.

hierarchy.h1: text-6xl sm:text-8xl lg:text-[10vw] uppercase tracking-tighter leading-[0.85] font-normal
hierarchy.h2: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-7xl uppercase tracking-tighter leading-none font-normal

layout_and_spacing.borders: Exposed grids. Use border-r, border-b everywhere to create a structural wireframe look. All borders are sharp (rounded-none).
layout_and_spacing.padding: Generous container padding (p-8 to p-16) mixed with extremely dense text blocks.
layout_and_spacing.radius: rounded-none everywhere. Brutalism relies on sharp, harsh corners.
layout_and_spacing.surfaces: Grid Borders and Retro-Futurism mix. Solid black backgrounds with stark white 1px borders.

motion.style: Kinetic, sharp, and abrupt. No slow bouncing. Use strict bezier curves or linear transitions.

variants.entrance: Fast Y-axis slide with opacity. duration: 0.3, ease: 'easeOut'
variants.hover: Instant or 150ms hard color inversion (bg-white text-black).
variants.marquee: Continuous linear scrolling using framer-motion or react-fast-marquee.

components.navigation: Sticky nav. border-b border-white/20. bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-xl. Logo left, mono-spaced links center, stark outline button right. rounded-none.
components.hero: Massive H1 'NO EXCUSES. JUST EDITH.' Full viewport height. Background image overlaid with bg-black/80. Giant CTA 'JOIN THE WAITLIST' as a stark white block with black text. Include a slow-drifting marquee at the bottom: 'ACCOUNTABILITY // DISCIPLINE // RESULTS //'.
components.problem_section: Asymmetric bento grid. Left column 1/3 width with sticky vertical text 'THE WEAKNESS'. Right column 2/3 width scrolling cards explaining why users fail (lack of discipline, lies, etc.). Dark minimalist photography used as card backgrounds.
components.solution_section: Giant 'THE PROTOCOL' heading. High contrast typography. Reveal animation on scroll.
components.how_it_works: 3-column CSS grid. Each step has a massive mono number (01, 02, 03) spanning the full width of the cell, followed by a harsh horizontal rule, then the explanation.
components.ai_chat_preview: The centerpiece. A dark grey (#0A0A0A) container with a stark white border. Brutalist chat bubbles. User bubble: border border-white/30, bg-transparent, text-white, square corners. EDITH bubble: bg-white text-black, square corners. Use Space Mono for timestamps. Add a blinking cursor effect for typing.
components.social_proof: Scrolling grid of testimonials. Format like raw data logs. 'SUBJECT 001', 'SUBJECT 002'. Monospace text, stark borders. Include gritty fitness photography.
components.final_cta: Full screen section, INVERTED theme. bg-white. Text and borders are black. Massive 'SUBMIT TO EDITH' text. Square input field and brutalist submit button.

accessibility.contrast: Extremely high contrast (Black and White). Meets APCA and WCAG AAA standards.
accessibility.interactions: Ensure hover states invert colors for clear affordance. Add data-testid attributes to all interactive elements.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required dependencies: framer-motion, lucide-react (or phosphor-icons).
Import custom fonts in CSS (Anton, Space Mono, Manrope) from Google Fonts.
Do NOT use 'rounded-*' classes unless explicitly targeting a circle (like an avatar). Everything must be squared off (rounded-none).
Use grid lines extensively. Apply 'border-white/20' to sections and grid items to create a wireframe/blueprint aesthetic.
Implement the AI chat preview with framer-motion to simulate typing or staggered message appearances. The aesthetic must be harsh and command-line like, not friendly like iMessage.
Use raw HTML forms customized with Tailwind for the waitlist inputs. Make them giant, square, with 2px borders.
Ensure the layout feels 'Tetris' like: asymmetrical blocks locking together with exposed borders. Make extensive use of 'uppercase' and 'tracking-tighter' for headers.
